stemHtml: Per the Montreal Convention of 1999 (ICAO Doc 9740), a carrier is liable for damage to checked baggage provided the event occurred…

options.a: On board the aircraft or during any period when the checked baggage was in the carrier's charge.
options.b: After the passenger has claimed the baggage but while still within the aerodrome perimeter.
options.c: Whether in the passenger's possession or with the baggage handling service.
options.d: Before check-in, while the baggage is within the aerodrome perimeter.
